item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer directly brakes the requested new transfer channel, names the prior three downstream split/route patches plus the current N+1 split request, reframes the repeated failure as a routing/intake/ownership model problem, and proposes unified intake and transfer ownership rules with consolidation before any new channel. It does not provide implementation copy or steps for opening the requested channel."}
